arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Route 53 Resolver firewall rule group.

creation_time.description: The date and time when the firewall rule group was created.

creator_request_id.description: A unique string that identifies the request that created the firewall rule group.

id.description: The unique identifier of the firewall rule group.

modification_time.description: The date and time when the firewall rule group was last modified.

name.description: The name of the firewall rule group.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the firewall rule group.

rule_count.description: The number of rules in the firewall rule group.

share_status.description: Indicates whether the firewall rule group is shared with other accounts.

status.description: The current status of the firewall rule group.

status_message.description: Additional information about the status of the firewall rule group.
